parameters.sqlQuery:
WITH baseline AS (
  SELECT ad_id, ad_name, channel, campaign_name,
         SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(clicks), NULLIF(SUM(impressions),0)) AS ctr_7d_baseline,
         SUM(impressions) AS impressions_7d
  FROM `{{ $vars.BQ_PROJECT }}.{{ $vars.BQ_DATASET }}.ads_daily`
  WHERE date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), INTERVAL 10 DAY)
                 AND DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), INTERVAL 4 DAY)
  GROUP BY ad_id, ad_name, channel, campaign_name
),
recent AS (
  SELECT ad_id,
         SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(clicks), NULLIF(SUM(impressions),0)) AS ctr_3d,
         SUM(impressions) AS impressions_3d,
         SUM(spend) AS spend_3d
  FROM `{{ $vars.BQ_PROJECT }}.{{ $vars.BQ_DATASET }}.ads_daily`
  WHERE date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), INTERVAL 3 DAY)
  GROUP BY ad_id
)
SELECT b.channel, b.campaign_name, b.ad_name,
       b.ctr_7d_baseline,
       r.ctr_3d,
       SAFE_DIVIDE(r.ctr_3d - b.ctr_7d_baseline, b.ctr_7d_baseline) AS ctr_delta_pct,
       r.impressions_3d,
       r.spend_3d
FROM baseline b
JOIN recent r ON b.ad_id = r.ad_id
WHERE r.impressions_3d >= 1000
  AND SAFE_DIVIDE(r.ctr_3d - b.ctr_7d_baseline, b.ctr_7d_baseline) < -0.20
ORDER BY ctr_delta_pct ASC

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ data: { name: $json.task_name, notes: $json.task_notes, projects: ['1214135581886045'], assignee: '1211896896006195', due_on: $json.due_on } }) }}
